side_effects.description: body dropped to floor, twisted knee, loss of bladder control, vomited, blackout, woke with heart racing, entire body red, sweating, alternating hot and cold with shivering, unable to stand or reach phone

protocol_notes: 15+ years peptide experience. First anaphylactic reaction in 15 years. Managed to swallow two Benadryl before first blackout when hands got itchy, which likely saved life. Required months of rehab for knee. Now carries EpiPen and antihistamines when using new peptides and informs spouse.
